_comment: Merge this agent_skills block into the demo project's .planning/config.json (GSD mode). Keys are the real GSD agent type names in this install — a fork may differ; run /gsd config or list the install's agent types and re-key. Each value is a list of skill directories (each holds a SKILL.md); GSD reads them into the agent at spawn. Rewrite the skills/dw-demo-* paths to the plugin's install base (e.g. ~/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/dynamicweb-skills/skills/...) or a local clone. See dw-demo-base/references/orchestrator.md.
